pages.title: What it is
pages.text: Ink cores are the core material of ink magic. For now, $(l)入$() victories grant a small amount, and monsters killed inside ink fields can drop more. They can repair staves.$(br2)Future systems will use them for rituals, seal strengthening, and larger instance content.

pages.title: Repair use
pages.text: Ink cores can repair staves on an anvil. Slot one: the stave to keep. Slot two: ink cores. Each core repairs a fixed 250 durability, up to 4 cores per operation.

pages.title: Why not 入?
pages.text: 入 gives vanilla supplies, brush momentum, and a small ink core reward. It is the low-friction combat loop.$(br2)墨 creates a risky field and can drop more ink cores over time. Later, 界 will become the directed material-farming loop.

pages.title: Later uses
pages.text: Planned direction: altar rituals, ink-core draws, seal upgrades, ink-field extension, and the larger 界 instance system.$(br2)Current version first closes the drop-and-repair loop.
